episodes.title: THE LEADER star, Vera Farmiga, gave the cult leader an in-depth analysis
episodes.description:
Vera Farmiga stars alongside Tim Blake Nelson in THE LEADER, a fresh look at the infamous Heaven's Gate cult. Vera went on quite the journey assuming the role of Bonnie Lu Nettles, and spoke at length with Den of Geek correspondent Emily Cappello about what made Bonnie and this cult so real. 

Watch our other interview for The Leader: https://youtu.be/YuqaM3YkEm8
Watch our interview for Cape Fear: https://youtu.be/Pm_QlN96Pmw

episodes.title: The Anatomy of a Cult: Deconstructing Heaven’s Gate With the Cast of The Leader
episodes.description:
In our exclusive interview for The Leader, we sit down with Tim Blake Nelson, director Michael J. Gallagher, and Grace Caroline Currey to explore the haunting story behind the Heaven’s Gate tragedy.
Tim Blake Nelson discusses his immersive approach to playing Marshall Applewhite—why he chose to believe every word his character said—and why he views the group’s search for community as a universal human trait rather than an "outrageous" anomaly.
Grace Caroline Currey shares her perspective on the character of Michelle, exploring how trauma and the need for a "cocoon" can make even the most extreme belief systems feel like a lifeline. We also dive into the director’s personal connection to the story, having grown up in the San Diego suburbs where the tragedy unfolded.
(Photo credit: Ben Mullen)
#heavensgate #timblakenelson #tribeca #tribecafilmfestival #heavensgatecult

episodes.title: 'Love Has Won: The Cult of Mother God' is a MUST-SEE Exploration of Amy Carlson's Inner Circle
episodes.description:
Filmmaker Hannah Olson got an intimate look at the Love Has Won group, whom some have accused of being a cult following Amy Carlson. Through her documentary on the Max streaming service, Olson explores the beliefs of the group members, what led them to follow Carlson so devotely, and what has happened in the aftermath following Carlson's death.
